recommendations.title: Muzzle: City of Wolves
recommendations.overview: LAPD officer Jake Rosser endeavors to lead a peaceful life with his family and retired K-9 officer, Socks. However, tranquility dissolves into chaos when a gang targets them in a brutal attack. Alongside his new K-9 partner Argos, Jake launches into

recommendations.title: Crypto
recommendations.overview: A young agent is tasked with investigating a tangled web of corruption and fraud in New York.

recommendations.title: High School
recommendations.overview: A high school valedictorian who gets baked with the local stoner finds himself the subject of a drug test. The situation causes him to concoct an ambitious plan to get his entire graduating class to face the same fate, and fail.

recommendations.title: Blade Runner 2049
recommendations.overview: Thirty years after the events of the first film, a new blade runner, LAPD Officer K, unearths a long-buried secret that has the potential to plunge what's left of society into chaos. K's discovery leads him on a quest to find Rick Deckard, a former L

recommendations.title: The Nice Guys
recommendations.overview: A private eye investigates the apparent suicide of a fading porn star in 1970s Los Angeles and uncovers a conspiracy.

recommendations.title: Backstabbing for Beginners
recommendations.overview: An idealistic young employee at the U.N. investigates the grisly murder of his predecessor – and uncovers a vast global conspiracy that may involve his own boss.

recommendations.title: Mulholland Falls
recommendations.overview: In 1950s Los Angeles, a special crime squad of the LAPD investigates the murder of a young woman.

recommendations.title: The Fast and the Furious
recommendations.overview: Dominic Toretto is a Los Angeles street racer suspected of masterminding a series of big-rig hijackings. When undercover cop Brian O'Conner infiltrates Toretto's iconoclastic crew, he falls for Toretto's sister and must choose a side: the gang or the

recommendations.title: Rush Hour
recommendations.overview: When Hong Kong Inspector Lee is summoned to Los Angeles to investigate a kidnapping, the FBI doesn't want any outside help and assigns cocky LAPD Detective James Carter to distract Lee from the case. Not content to watch the action from the sidelines

recommendations.title: Andhadhun
recommendations.overview: A series of mysterious events changes the life of a blind pianist who now must report a crime that was actually never witnessed by him.
